name: corestack-agent-team
description: A 25-member AI agent team covering leadership, architecture, cloud, engineering, platform, and marketing — designed for Claude Code and GitHub Copilot

plugins.name: leadership
plugins.description: Leadership agents: CTO, VP Engineering, Director of Engineering, Engineering Manager, Product Manager, Scrum Master

plugins.name: architecture
plugins.description: Architecture agents: Technical Architect, Security Architect, Data Architect, AI/ML Architect, Architecture Docs Agent

plugins.name: cloud
plugins.description: Cloud architect agents: AWS, Azure, GCP, OCI

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Engineering agents: Full-Stack Developer, QA Engineer, MongoDB DBA, Prompt Engineer, Release Manager, Technical Writer, Test Coverage Agent

plugins.name: platform
plugins.description: Platform agents: Corestack Expert, FinOps Expert

plugins.name: orchestrators
plugins.description: Multi-agent workflow orchestrators for Plan, Brainstorm, SDLC, Code Review, Bug Fix, Deploy, Documentation, and Sprint modes

plugins.name: azuredevops
plugins.description: Azure DevOps project management: create work items, build Feature→Story→Task hierarchies, sprint status, capacity planning, weekly status reports, and bulk import from PRD/TDD docs or ad-hoc descriptions
